arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain have been linked to Victor Osimhen in the last two transfer windows, and with summer approaching, speculation is heating up. Now at Galatasaray, Osimhen have rediscovered the form that made him a standout in the 2022-23 season, attracting interest from top clubs across Europe. arts.ttl: Video: Watch Desire Doue’s Incredible Second-Half Brace Against ASSE in Ligue 1
arts.sum: After conceding an early goal to AS Saint-Étienne in the ninth minute from Lucas Stassin, Paris Saint-Germain scored three unanswered goals in the match, with the first coming from Goncalo Ramos, who converted a penalty just before halftime. Coming out of the break, PSG took the lead thanks to an excellent goal from Khvicha Kvaratskhelia. arts.ttl: Man Utd Unwilling to Meet £67M Asking Price for Newcastle Target With PSG Sell-on Clause
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain are closely watching Hugo Ekitike’s potential move to Eintracht Frankfurt, as they stand to receive a percentage of the transfer fee. Newcastle have considered Ekitike as a potential replacement for Alexander Isak, with the club previously showing interest during his time at PSG, per CaughtOffside.
